expectations.text: Uses viewChild() signal instead of @ViewChild decorator
expectations.evidence: Line 71: `@ViewChild("cardContainer") cardContainer!: ElementRef<HTMLDivElement>;` — uses old decorator

expectations.text: Uses input() / output() signals instead of @Input / @Output decorators
expectations.evidence: Lines 65-69: `@Input() name!: string`, `@Input() date!: string`, `@Output() delete = new EventEmitter<void>()`
No OnPush in the component decorator

expectations.text: No setTimeout anywhere in the output
